calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Patrick Heard, #11055.
Petitioners: Benjamin Factor & Diana Factor, present in pro per as Guardian ad litems for the Minor: John Christian Goriano.
Petitioners were placed under oath and and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: John Christian Goriano Factor.

Decree Changing Name was submitted and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-29-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioners: benjamin Factor and Diana Factor, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: John Christian Soriano, were sworn and examined.
At Petitioners' request, matter is taken off calendar.
Petitioners to file an Amended Petition for OSC for a Name Change of a Minor with proper name requested and to re-publish the OSC.
